response: Rewrite a business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL. In 2002, [Name] & The [Team Name] at [Real Estate Company] was founded by [Name] and is an organization that offers Real Estate Agency expertise to both sellers and buyers in commercial and residential properties. The company ([Name] & The [Team Name] at [Real Estate Company]) focuses on serving homeowners and business owners as a trusted advisor in all aspects of real estate and financing, with the goal of building long-term relationships. [Name] and his team serve the following locations in Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, Lancaster Park, and other areas throughout central Florida, and is operated by a small team of real estate experts.
